About Us

We're GEO Pioneers

The first agency built exclusively for medical practices in the AI era. We don't do traditional SEO—we engineer AI recommendations.

Our Mission

To ensure every patient finds the best medical care by connecting qualified practices with AI-referred patients seeking their expertise.

We believe the future of healthcare discovery isn't through ads—it's through AI recommendations. Our work helps the best practices get discovered by patients who need them most.

50+
Medical Practices
$12M
Revenue Recovered
4.9/5
Client Rating
100%
Medical Focus

Our Values

Patient-First

We believe every patient deserves to find the best care. Our work connects qualified providers with patients seeking their expertise.

Results-Driven

No vanity metrics. We measure success by patient inquiries, consultation bookings, and revenue impact for our clients.

Medical Expertise

We exclusively serve medical practices. This focus gives us unmatched understanding of patient acquisition in healthcare.

AI-Native

Built for the AI era. We don't retrofit old SEO tactics—we engineer for how modern patients actually find care.

Leadership Team

SW

Sam Wang

Founder & CEO

Former healthcare marketing executive who saw the AI revolution coming. Built StackMatrices to help practices navigate the new patient acquisition landscape.

AC

Dr. Amanda Chen

Medical Advisor

Board-certified physician with 15+ years in private practice. Ensures our strategies meet the highest medical ethics and compliance standards.

MT

Michael Torres

Head of GEO

AI researcher turned SEO specialist. Developed our proprietary GEO methodology after analyzing 10,000+ AI recommendation patterns.

SK

Sarah Kim

Client Success

Former practice manager who understands the daily challenges of medical offices. Leads our white-glove implementation process.

Our Journey

2023

StackMatrices founded

2023

First client: Beverly Hills plastic surgery

2026

Reached 50+ medical practices served

2026

$12M+ revenue recovered for clients

2026

Expanded to multi-location chains

2025

Launched AI monitoring platform

2025

100+ practices across US & Canada

2026

Industry monitor system deployed

2026

Expanded to dental and fertility clinics

Why We're Different

Medical Only

We exclusively serve medical practices. No restaurants, no lawyers, no e-commerce. This focus gives us unmatched expertise in your field.

AI-Native

Built for ChatGPT, Claude, and Perplexity—not retrofitted old SEO tactics. We engineer for how patients actually find care today.

Results Guaranteed

We measure success by your patient inquiries and revenue. If we don't deliver results, we don't consider the engagement successful.

Fully Compliant with Healthcare Privacy Standards (HIPAA/GDPR Equivalent Semantic Handling)
Stackmatrices

Specialized GEO Agency for High-Value Medical Practices. We secure your brand's citation at the exact moment of patient intent.
